item.title: Sai Life Sciences Ltd Stock Hits All-Time High Amid Robust Performance
item.description: Sai Life Sciences Ltd has reached a significant milestone by hitting its all-time high, reflecting robust performance and sustained growth in the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector. The stock’s recent surge underscores the company’s strong fundamentals and market resilience amid a challenging environment. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Balrampur Chini Mills Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.07% Surge on 4 Mar 2026
item.description: Balrampur Chini Mills Ltd demonstrated robust intraday performance on 4 March 2026, surging 7.07% to touch a day’s high of Rs 500.2, significantly outperforming its sector and the broader market indices. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: BSL Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Underperformance
item.description: Shares of BSL Ltd, a player in the Garments & Apparels sector, have declined to a new 52-week low, closing just 3.5% above the lowest price of Rs 121.3. This marks a significant downturn for the stock, which has been on a downward trajectory over the past year, reflecting ongoing challenges in its financial and operational metrics. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Sundaram Finance Ltd Hits New 52-Week High of Rs 5,640
item.description: Sundaram Finance Ltd, a prominent player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, reached a significant milestone today by hitting a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs.5640. This achievement underscores the stock’s robust momentum amid a volatile market environment, outperforming its sector and broader indices. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Indian Acrylics Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Indian Acrylics Ltd, a player in the petrochemicals sector, touched a new 52-week low of Rs.5.16 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid a sustained downward trend over recent sessions. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Frontline Corporation Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.26.07
item.description: Frontline Corporation Ltd, a key player in the Transport Services sector, has reached a new 52-week low of Rs.26.07, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid broader market fluctuations and sectoral pressures. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Sri Ramakrishna Mills (Coimbatore) Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Sri Ramakrishna Mills (Coimbatore) Ltd has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.35.1 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid ongoing financial pressures and sector underperformance. The stock has been on a downward trajectory, reflecting a challenging period for the company within the Garments & Apparels industry. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Revathi Equipment India Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Shares of Revathi Equipment India Ltd have fallen to an all-time low, reflecting a sustained period of underperformance and financial contraction. The stock’s recent decline underscores significant pressures within the industrial manufacturing sector, with the company’s market valuation and financial metrics signalling a challenging environment. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Sundaram Finance Ltd Hits All-Time High, Marking a Significant Milestone
item.description: Sundaram Finance Ltd, a leading player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has reached an all-time high in its stock price, marking a significant milestone in its market journey. The stock closed near its 52-week high, reflecting robust performance and sustained investor confidence. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Sundaram Finance Ltd Hits Intraday High with 5.8% Surge on 4 March 2026
item.description: Sundaram Finance Ltd demonstrated robust intraday performance on 4 Mar 2026, surging to an intraday high of ₹5,553.7, marking a 4.72% rise from its previous close. The stock closed with a notable gain of 5.8%, significantly outperforming its sector and broader market indices amid a volatile trading session. Time: 34 minutes ago

item.title: Poly Medicure Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.08% Surge on 4 March 2026
item.description: Poly Medicure Ltd demonstrated robust intraday strength on 4 Mar 2026, surging to a day’s high of Rs 1,407.8, marking a 7.77% increase from its previous close. This performance outpaced the broader Healthcare Services sector and the Sensex, reflecting notable trading momentum amid a mixed market backdrop. Time: 34 minutes ago

item.title: Rander Corporation Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.9.85
item.description: Rander Corporation Ltd, a Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC), touched a new 52-week low of Rs.9.85 today, marking a significant decline in its share price amid subdued financial performance and valuation concerns. The stock’s fall to this level reflects ongoing pressures within the company and the broader sector. Time: 49 minutes ago

item.title: R O Jewels Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: R O Jewels Ltd, a player in the Gems, Jewellery And Watches sector, recorded a new 52-week low of Rs.1.21 today, marking a significant decline amid a sustained downward trend. The stock has underperformed its sector and benchmark indices, reflecting ongoing concerns about its financial health and market positioning. Time: 52 minutes ago

item.title: Shalby Ltd. Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.145.4 Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Shalby Ltd., a key player in the hospital sector, has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.145.4 today, marking a significant decline in its share price amid a sustained downward trend. The stock has now recorded a four-day consecutive fall, cumulatively losing 6.68% over this period, reflecting ongoing pressures within the company’s performance metrics and market positioning. Time: 52 minutes ago

item.title: Arvind SmartSpaces Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Arvind SmartSpaces Ltd, a key player in the realty sector, has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.496.7 today, marking a significant decline amid a sustained downward trend. The stock has underperformed both its sector and the broader market over the past year, reflecting a combination of subdued financial results and valuation concerns. Time: 52 minutes ago

item.title: Sinclairs Hotels Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Sinclairs Hotels Ltd has touched a new 52-week low, closing just 0.48% above its lowest price in the past year at Rs 72.01. The stock's recent performance reflects ongoing pressures within the Hotels & Resorts sector, with the share price declining amid broader market fluctuations and sectoral underperformance. Time: 52 minutes ago

item.title: Ankit Metal & Power Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.1.6 Amidst Continued Financial Strain
item.description: Ankit Metal & Power Ltd, a player in the ferrous metals sector, touched a new 52-week low of Rs.1.6 today, marking a significant decline amid ongoing financial and market pressures. This fresh low comes despite the stock outperforming its sector on the day, reflecting persistent challenges faced by the company over the past year. Time: 53 minutes ago

item.title: Caprihans India Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.65.38
item.description: Caprihans India Ltd’s shares declined sharply to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.65.38 on 4 March 2026, marking a significant drop amid sustained downward momentum. The stock has underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting ongoing concerns about its financial health and market positioning. Time: 53 minutes ago

item.title: Veljan Denison Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.895
item.description: Veljan Denison Ltd, a player in the Auto Components & Equipments sector, touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs.895 today, marking a significant decline amid a sustained downward trend. The stock has underperformed both its sector and broader market indices, reflecting ongoing pressures on its price performance. Time: 54 minutes ago

item.title: Indoco Remedies Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.194.4
item.description: Indoco Remedies Ltd’s stock declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.194.4 today, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing downward trajectory. The pharmaceutical company’s shares have been under pressure, reflecting a series of financial and market challenges that have weighed on investor sentiment and overall performance. Time: 54 minutes ago
